finalized_plan.description: Retrieve Fiona Apple's discography from reliable sources (such as official websites or music databases) and extract the album titles and release years for albums released before 1999
Retrieve Paula Cole's discography from reliable sources and extract the album titles and release years for albums released before 1999
Compile a consolidated list of the qualifying albums from both artists based on the pre-1999 release criterion

For each album in the list, locate Robert Christgau’s review (via his website, published reviews, or established music review databases) and determine whether a letter grade was assigned to that album
Identify the albums from the consolidated list that did not receive a letter grade from Robert Christgau
Sort the resulting album titles alphabetically
Format the sorted list as a comma-delimited string

root_cause_reasoning: The agent fabricated the answer without verifying it against the data source
